exam_price_notes: Open-book (MSP manual allowed). Pricing varies by region.

testing_centers.notes: Online proctored via PeopleCert or at PeopleCert authorized test centres globally

id_requirements: One valid government-issued photo ID. Name must match PeopleCert registration exactly.
exam_rules: ITIL and PRINCE2 Foundation: closed-book. PRINCE2 Practitioner: open-book (official PRINCE2 manual only). No notes or personal items. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Renew every 3 years through PeopleCert's subscription model: earn CPDs (Continuing Professional Development) or retake the exam. Digital badge re-issued upon renewal.

retake_policy.notes: No mandatory waiting period. Full exam fee required for retake.

domains.name: Applying MSP Principles and Governance Themes

official_study_resources.title: ITIL 4 Foundation Publication (Axelos)
official_study_resources.notes: Official AXELOS publications; also available via authorized training organizations (ATOs)
